prompt: In Mail, remove a sender from the VIP list — click the VIP icon (star) next to a sender, or use the VIPs panel in Mail's sidebar. After acting, write 'vip-removed' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/133-vip-remove-confirm.txt (eval paper trail; VIPs.plist is TCC-protected). Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail vip_remove vip-removed ~/Desktop/kinbench/133-vip-remove-confirm.txt'`.
